g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user do when uploading a document?')
sendPrompt('How does the direct-to-R2 upload work?')
sendPrompt('How does the BullMQ worker pick up ingestion jobs?')
sendPrompt('How does pdf-parse extract text from PDFs?')
sendPrompt('What chunking strategy does HomeVault use?')
sendPrompt('How are document chunks embedded with OpenAI?')
sendPrompt('How are embeddings stored in pgvector?')
sendPrompt('How does the frontend show document processing status?')
